title: Creative Co-Operation
description: Delve into an ancient sanctum lost to time and overcome more than eight co-operative puzzle chambers in this two-player Minecraft adventure map featuring the Create mod.
body:
[Need a server to play this map on? Check out BisectHosting and use code CLARK for 25% off your first purchase.](https://www.bisecthosting.com/) ## Important: Modrinth does not allow uploading the server pack needed to play this adventure map. I highly recommend visiting the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/creative-co-operation/files/all) listing instead and downloading there. **Creative Co-Operation** is a two-player puzzle map with a focus on mixing the Create Mod with Vanilla Minecraft to make a set of unique puzzle experiences. Players will have to work together to overcome 8 puzzle chambers containing several puzzles each, and uncover the mystery of an ancient dungeon ruled by an entity beyond time. ## Features: 👥 Strictly a 2 player adventure map.
🕕 Approximately 6-8 hours of playtime.
🧩 8 bespoke puzzle chambers containing a variety of puzzles testing different skills.
⚙️ Integration with the Create mod, adding some mechanically interesting puzzles.
🧠 A mindbending co-op experience offering the ultimate test of trust and teamwork.
❔ Overcome the trials of the mysterious entity known as the Timekeeper, and unravel their motive.
## Credits & Acknowledgements: **Creative Co-Operation** was developed as my first fully fledged adventure map over the course of several months and 700+hrs as a passion project for community members to play for free. All of the puzzles, commands, scripting, and overall map design was lead by myself (**Clarkster**). Special thanks to **EllaLellaBella** who greatly helped with the Environment and Design aspect of the map, and **ZenithRaiden**, who helped with sound design and contributed with some custom tracks. No money is made directly from this project, but if you wish to donate and support my endeavours and more projects like this one, [you can do so on my Ko-Fi page](https://ko-fi.com/clarkuk). Many thanks to the following testers who helped me polish the map in the finals days up to launch: **ZenithRaiden, Falling_Apples, EllaLellaBella, djwallaby, Marjobon, Woozelem, TheBigBeardedBoy, killilea2000**. ## Installation: 1. Download the [Creative Co-Operation Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/creative-co-operation/versions). 2. Download the [Creative Co-Operation Server Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/creative-co-operation/files/all). 3. Unzip the Creative Co-Operation Server Pack into your server's root directory. Make sure that the level-name parameter in server.properties is set to the same name as the folder name ("saves/Creative Co-Operation" by default). 4. Run the modpack through your launcher of choice, and connect to your server to begin playing.
